incentive.statement: Make every Classical #3 result component feel like one coherent Canvas/Andrews surface without changing grammar ownership, formulas, or interaction contracts.

coordinator.responsibility: Coordinate shared visual tokens, component styling, focused tests, and live proof while preventing presentation from constructing grammar.

outcome: Selected answers, format views, operator controls, authority receipts, proof sections, and the authorized derivation read as one Classical result surface.

responsibilities.statement: Own the common Classical result visual language without changing DOM or grammar structure.

actors.contribution: Create and apply shared result tokens and component treatments.

responsibilities.statement: Keep selected results, formulas, derivation explanations, and authority receipts application-owned and unchanged.

actors.contribution: Preserve existing typed frames and fail-closed result contracts while presentation changes.

responsibilities.statement: Prove common styling, preserved formula structures, responsive behavior, and mode parity.

actors.contribution: Add focused style contracts and perform live desktop and narrow-width proof.

responsibilities.statement: Keep the current target, board, shared action, and alignment evidence synchronized.

actors.contribution: Record scope and closure without treating this as a lesson handoff.

retirements.removalEvidence: Selected VNC and NNC results now use the same full border, rounded white panel, teal answer inset, uppercase label hierarchy, and shared spacing as the authorized-derivation surface; the old left-border slab is overridden.
Every Classical mode, derivation, voice, and subtype operator grid now uses the common gradient, teal border, rounded container, and teal active pill treatment.
One body-scoped token set now controls the root result, selected answer, Linear/Diagram views, authority receipt, proof actions/disclosures, and the authorized-derivation variables.

evidence.result: 384/384 passed, including the common Classical Canvas/Andrews visual-system contract

Direct huāqui authorized Nihuāc.; the result root used the shared gradient, 12px radius, and shadow, while selected form, format card, receipt, and operator controls used the common teal component vocabulary with zero overflow.

Type 1 applicative authorized Nimitzhuāquih.; selected result, receipt, and authorized derivation each measured the same width and resolved to rgba(255,255,255,.82), rgba(40,95,87,.14), 10px radius, 12px padding, and no competing shadow.
Type 1 causative authorized Nichuātz.; selected result and authorized derivation retained identical background, border, and radius styling with no horizontal overflow.
Phone-width Result proof measured a 379px root and 360px selected, receipt, and derivation panels with 9px responsive padding, one-column participant history, and zero page or component overflow.
The final in-app tab reported zero warning or error logs.
ALIGNED with zero renderer construction, optional dependency, contract, browser-script, or tracked-report regression
